glosses.ja: 年金生活者; 退職者

translations.fr: Mon grand-père est à la retraite.
translations.ja: 祖父は定年退職しました。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Opa' (1st person singular possessor; agrees with masculine nominative singular).
Head noun of the subject noun phrase (nominative singular).
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal (present, 3rd person singular).
Predicate noun (predicative nominative) describing the subject.

sentences.target: Im Café sitzt ein Rentner am Fenster.
sentences.reading: /ɪm kaˈfeː zɪtst aɪn ˈʁɛntnɐ am ˈfɛnstɐ/

translations.de: Im Café sitzt ein Rentner am Fenster.
translations.ipa: /ɪm kaˈfeː zɪtst aɪn ˈʁɛntnɐ am ˈfɛnstɐ/
translations.en: In the café, a retiree sits by the window.
translations.es: En el café, un jubilado está sentado junto a la ventana.
translations.fr: Au café, un retraité est assis près de la fenêtre.
translations.it: Al bar, un pensionato è seduto vicino alla finestra.
translations.ko: 카페에서 창가에 은퇴한 어르신이 앉아 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在咖啡馆里，一位退休老人坐在窗边。
translations.yue: 喺咖啡店有位退休嘅長者坐喺窗邊。
translations.ru: В кафе у окна сидит пенсионер.
translations.pt: No café, um aposentado está sentado perto da janela.
translations.he: בבית הקפה יושב גמלאי ליד החלון.
translations.tr: Kafede bir emekli pencere kenarında oturuyor.
translations.vi: Trong quán cà phê, một người về hưu ngồi bên cửa sổ.
translations.ar: في المقهى يجلس متقاعد بجوار النافذة.
translations.nl: In het café zit een gepensioneerde bij het raam.
translations.uk: У кафе біля вікна сидить пенсіонер.
translations.hu: A kávézóban egy nyugdíjas az ablaknál ül.
translations.hi: कैफ़े में एक सेवानिवृत्त व्यक्ति खिड़की के पास बैठा है.
translations.pl: W kawiarni przy oknie siedzi emeryt.
translations.el: Στο καφέ κάθεται ένας συνταξιούχος δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: På kafé sitter en pensjonist ved vinduet.
translations.id: Di kafe, seorang pensiunan duduk di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: På kaféet sitter en pensionär vid fönstret.
translations.ro: La cafenea, un pensionar stă lângă fereastră.
translations.cs: V kavárně sedí u okna důchodce.
translations.da: På caféen sidder en pensionist ved vinduet.
translations.ja: カフェで、窓際に定年退職した人が座っている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative, introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Object of the preposition 'im' (dative singular); setting/location.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular); verb-second position; takes the nominative subject 'ein Rentner'.
Indefinite article modifying 'Rentner' (nominative singular).
Grammatical subject (nominative singular) of 'sitzt'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative, introduces a positional prepositional phrase.
Object of the preposition 'am' (dative singular).

sentences.target: Ich helfe einem Rentner im Park.

translations.de: Ich helfe einem Rentner im Park.
translations.en: I help a retiree in the park.
translations.es: Ayudo a un jubilado en el parque.
translations.fr: J’aide un retraité dans le parc.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公园帮一位退休老人。
translations.yue: 我喺公園幫一位退休嘅長者。
translations.pt: Eu ajudo um aposentado no parque.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp một người về hưu trong công viên.
translations.nl: Ik help een gepensioneerde in het park.
translations.hi: मैं पार्क में एक सेवानिवृत्त व्यक्ति की मदद करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg hjelper en pensjonist i parken.
translations.id: Saya membantu seorang pensiunan di taman.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper en pensionär i parken.
translations.ro: Îl ajut pe un pensionar în parc.
translations.da: Jeg hjælper en pensionist i parken.
translations.ja: 公園で定年退職した人を手伝う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (nominative, 1st person singular).
Finite main verb (1st person singular); selects a dative object.
Indefinite article (dative singular masculine) modifying 'Rentner'.
Indirect object (dative) governed by 'helfen'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative, introduces a locative PP.
Object of 'im' (dative singular); location.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin fragt den Rentner nach dem Weg.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaχbaʁɪn fʁaːkt deːn ˈʁɛntnɐ naːx deːm veːk/

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin fragt den Rentner nach dem Weg.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaχbaʁɪn fʁaːkt deːn ˈʁɛntnɐ naːx deːm veːk/
translations.en: Our neighbor asks the retiree for directions.
translations.es: Nuestra vecina le pide indicaciones al jubilado.
translations.fr: Notre voisine demande son chemin au retraité.
translations.it: La nostra vicina chiede indicazioni al pensionato.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃이 은퇴한 어르신에게 길을 물어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的邻居向那位退休老人问路。
translations.yue: 我哋個女鄰居問嗰位退休嘅長者路。
translations.ru: Наша соседка спрашивает у пенсионера дорогу.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha pede informações ao aposentado.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của chúng tôi hỏi người về hưu đường đi.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw vraagt de gepensioneerde de weg.
translations.hu: A szomszédasszonyunk útbaigazítást kér a nyugdíjastól.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन उस सेवानिवृत्त व्यक्ति से रास्ता पूछती है.
translations.pl: Nasza sąsiadka pyta emeryta o drogę.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας ζητά οδηγίες από τον συνταξιούχο.
translations.nb: Naboen vår spør pensjonisten om veien.
translations.id: Tetangga kami bertanya arah kepada pensiunan itu.
translations.sv: Vår granne frågar pensionären om vägen.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră îi cere indicații pensionarului.
translations.cs: Naše sousedka se ptá důchodce na cesty?
translations.da: Vores nabo spørger pensionisten om vej.
translations.ja: 近所の女性が定年退職した人に道を尋ねる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Nachbarin'; agrees in gender/number/case.
Head noun of the subject noun phrase (nominative singular).
Finite main verb (3rd person singular); takes an accusative object and a 'nach'-PP complement.
Definite article (accusative singular masculine) modifying 'Rentner'.
Direct object (accusative) of 'fragt'.
Preposition governing dative; with 'fragen' forms the construction 'nach etwas fragen' ('ask for').
Definite article (dative singular masculine) modifying 'Weg'.
Object of the preposition 'nach' (dative); here meaning 'directions'.
